edward-keelan-octopus-ventures.notes: Cosmic campaign 1. LinkedIn DM: 'Thanks for the poster.' Warm, brief. Meeting ask sent, went quiet; routing question (People/Talent side) awaiting response.

hussein-kanji-hoxton-ventures.notes: Cosmic campaign 1. Email: 'Received the newsprint art today. It is pretty cool. Going up on our walls.' Meeting ask went quiet; wall-photo ask sent. Anonymised quote cleared for external use.

simon-menashy-mmc-ventures.notes: Cosmic campaign 1. 'Eye-catching campaign, very clever' + explicit route-in: get a portfolio company to recommend. Shane (existing client at MMC portfolio co) recommendation in motion. Quote cleared. Shaped campaign 2 strategy.

hector-mason-episode-1-ventures.notes: Cosmic campaign 1. Engaged but flagged environmental concern about the board (thought plastic; it is paper-faced foam core). Materials feedback logged; plastic-free alternatives being explored with Birch. Routing question (Paul Fifield) awaiting response.

chris-smith-playfair-capital.notes: Cosmic campaign 1. Strongest buying signal: 'Have you placed anybody within the Playfair portfolio yet?' Named live roles at Protex AI and Nory; Matthew contacting both directly, keeping Chris posted. His question is the brief for campaign 2.

brent-hoberman-firstminute-capital.notes: Cosmic campaign 1. Piece forwarded Brent -> Min (COO) -> Harri (EA), who asked for more info: active inbound, hottest lead. 15 minutes with Min proposed. The internal forwarding chain is exactly what physical outreach is designed to create.

james-wright-seedcamp.notes: Cosmic campaign 1. Polite decline with structural feedback: Seedcamp is pre-recruiter stage; larger portfolio cos handled by later-stage investors. Useful targeting signal. Closed.

stephen-millard-notion-capital.notes: Cosmic campaign 1. 'No thank you.' Flat. Closed.

andrew-scott-7percent-ventures.notes: Cosmic campaign 1. Undelivered (only failed delivery of the 20).
